body: # Health care sector: Investing in stocks that help keep you well. Regardless of your age, condition, or financial situation, you likely spend some money on products and services to maintain your health, whether it’s a few bucks at the pharmacy or a major hospital visit. This focus on wellness is part of what makes health care a relatively stable part of anyone’s investment portfolio. Knowing which industries in the sector to invest in and when can help you position your portfolio for growth, mitigate market risk, and take advantage of both stable and speculative opportunities in the market. ## What is the health care sector? The health care sector includes a range of companies that offer products and services aimed at maintaining and improving human health. If you’re wary of investing in individual stocks, you can still target the health care sector by investing in a themed mutual fund or exchange-traded fund (ETF).
You need health care stocks in your portfolio and I've found five that will not only protect your portfolio but also grow your money.

# Best Healthcare Stocks: Top Medical Stocks to Invest in 2026. Best Healthcare Stocks to Buy Now: Top Medical Stock Investments 2026 | LiteFinance. NVO is one of the top health care stocks, bolstered by the company's dedication to research and development, as well as medical diagnostics and digital health innovation. The company's strong portfolio in the pharmaceutical industry, stable business in the medical device segment, and consistent demand for its products make its securities one of the best health care stocks for dividend income. There are various ways to invest in stocks of healthcare companies, depending on the investor's goals and strategy. Besides, consider the iShares US Healthcare ETF (IYH), which includes the largest companies in the US healthcare industry and offers exposure to pharmaceuticals, biotech, medical device companies, and health care stocks. Therefore, top health care stocks and smart investments in medical companies can help you build a balanced portfolio. Best Healthcare Stocks: Top Medical Stocks to Invest in 2026.
